requirement_topic.en: Nama / Distributor Grid Connection and APSR-Regulated Electricity Sector
requirement_topic.zh: Nama/配电商并网及APSR监管电力行业
requirement_topic.zht: Nama/配電商併網及APSR監管電力行業

summary.en: Oman electricity-sector activities are regulated by the Authority for Public Services Regulation, while connection of EV chargers to a distribution network is normally handled through the relevant licensed distribution company, including Nama group entities where applicable. Charger projects may need site-specific review for load capacity, service connection, metering, protection coordination, earthing, harmonics, power quality, civil works, commissioning, and any charge-point-operator or landlord requirements.
summary.zh: 阿曼电力行业活动由公共服务监管局监管，而电动汽车充电桩接入配电网通常通过相关持牌配电公司处理，适用时包括Nama集团实体。充电项目可能需要针对供电容量、用电接入、计量、保护配合、接地、谐波、电能质量、土建、调试以及充电运营方或业主要求进行现场特定审查。
summary.zht: 阿曼電力行業活動由公共服務監管局監管，而電動汽車充電樁接入配電網通常通過相關持牌配電公司處理，適用時包括Nama集團實體。充電項目可能需要針對供電容量、用電接入、計量、保護配合、接地、諧波、電能品質、土建、調試以及充電運營方或業主要求進行現場特定審查。

standards_or_laws: APSR-regulated electricity-sector licensing and distribution framework
Nama Electricity Distribution or other licensed distributor connection procedures where applicable
Oman distribution-code, wiring, metering, and service-connection requirements applicable to the site
Project owner and charge-point-operator commissioning requirements

summary.en: China domestic acceptance commonly relies on GB/T 18487 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930 communication for DC systems, and local grid or project acceptance. These records do not replace Oman distributor connection review, APSR-regulated utility practice, site electrical approval, or local commissioning.
summary.zh: 中国国内验收通常依据GB/T 18487设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930通信，以及当地电网或项目验收。这些记录不能替代阿曼配电商接入审查、APSR监管下的公用事业实践、现场电气批准或本地调试。
summary.zht: 中國國內驗收通常依據GB/T 18487設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930通訊，以及當地電網或項目驗收。這些記錄不能替代阿曼配電商接入審查、APSR監管下的公用事業實務、現場電氣批准或本地調試。

gap.en: Prepare single-line diagrams, maximum-demand and diversity calculations, charger nameplate ratings, harmonic and EMC data, protection settings, earthing design, metering arrangement, load-management logic, network communication details, installation method statements, commissioning records, and local installer credentials. Oman grid acceptance is site-specific and cannot be proven solely by factory product certification.
gap.zh: 应准备单线图、最大需量和同时系数计算、充电桩铭牌额定值、谐波及EMC数据、保护设定、接地设计、计量安排、负载管理逻辑、网络通信细节、安装方法说明、调试记录和本地安装商资质。阿曼并网验收具有现场特定性，不能仅凭工厂产品认证证明。
gap.zht: 應準備單線圖、最大需量和同時係數計算、充電樁銘牌額定值、諧波及EMC數據、保護設定、接地設計、計量安排、負載管理邏輯、網絡通訊細節、安裝方法說明、調試記錄和本地安裝商資質。阿曼併網驗收具有現場特定性，不能僅憑工廠產品認證證明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installations where the licensed distributor, Nama entity, APSR-regulated utility process, electrical permit, metering requirement, or site owner requires review or approval
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid or project acceptance applies domestically and is not an Oman distributor approval substitute

source.publisher: Authority for Public Services Regulation, Oman

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An Oman-ready EV charger package needs both product evidence and site/grid evidence. Confirm the relevant distributor or Nama connection route before quoting, shipping, or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向阿曼的充电桩资料包需要同时覆盖产品证据和现场/电网证据。报价、发货或调试前，应确认相关配电商或Nama接入路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向阿曼的充電樁資料包需要同時覆蓋產品證據和現場/電網證據。報價、發貨或調試前，應確認相關配電商或Nama接入路徑。
